calendar.matters:
ACCOUNTING PETITION RE: Accounting #2, Report, Fees
Off Calendar Mar-24-2026 Off Calendar
MINI MINUTES: The following related matters are called concurrently: PTR-23-306264, PES-24-307218 and PTR-25-308500.

Appearances (via Zoom videoconference):
Ann Kavanagh, Esq., for Gene Yue, Trustee/Guardian of the Estate of minors (via zoom).
Melanie Emmons Esq., for Sook-Ling Leung, Petitioner/Trustee/Guardian of the Person of Minors (in person).
Zachary McCoy as Guardian Ad Litem (via zoom).

The Court heard no objections. The matter is taken under submission with the intent to grant. All other matters are taken off calendar.

Judge:Russell S. Roeca. Clerk: A. Datt. Not reported.

ACCOUNTING PETITION RE: Accounting #2, Report, Fees
Off Calendar Feb-17-2026 Continued To Mar-24-26 At 09:00 A.M. In Dept 204

ACCOUNTING PETITION RE: Accounting #2, Report, Fees
Off Calendar Nov-12-2025 Continued To Feb-17-26 At 09:00 A.M. In Dept 204

ACCOUNTING PETITION RE: Accounting #2, Report, Fees
Off Calendar Sep-03-2025 Continued To Nov-12-25 At 09:00 A.M. In Dept 204
MINI MINUTES:
The following related matters are called concurrently: PTR-23-306264, PES-24-307218 and PTR-25-308500.

Appearances (via Zoom videoconference):
Ann Kavanagh, Esq., for Gene Yue, Trustee/Guardian of the Estate of minors (via zoom).
Melanie Emmons Esq., for Sook-Ling Leung, Petitioner/Trustee/Guardian of the Person of Minors (in person).

Discussion was held regarding the Motion to Enforce Settlement Agreement filed in San Mateo County, that counsel oppose continuing the matters until San Mateo County reaches decision on the motion, and to Petition to bring both trust under Court supervision, and that the parties to split the cost of the Guardian ad Litem fees.

The Parties agreed to participate in mediation. The Court signed the order referring the matter to Pro Bono Mediation. Mediation must be completed no later than November 5, 2025. The Parties are to notify the Probate Examiner as to the outcome of mediation by November 7, 2025. The matter is continued to November 12, 2025 at 9:00 a.m., in Dept. 204 and the Parties are to return on November 12, 2025 at 9:00 a.m., in Dept. 204 for Status of mediation.

The Court intends to issue a Breslin Order and appoint a Guardian ad Litem.


Judge: Stephen Murphy. Clerk: A. Datt. Deputy: Singh. Not reported.

ACCOUNTING PETITION RE: Accounting #2, Report, Fees
Off Calendar Jul-23-2025 Continued To Sep-03-25 At 09:00 A.M. In Dept 204
MINI MINUTES:
The following related matters are called concurrently: PTR-23-306264 and PES-24-307218.

Appearances (via Zoom videoconference):
Ann Kavanagh, Esq., for Gene Yue, Trustee/Guardian of the Estate of minors.
Rowena Navia, Esq., for Sook-Ling Leung, Petitioner/Trustee/Guardian of the Person of Minors.

At the outset, counsel presented oral argument to support their positions regarding the subject matters. Ms. Kavanagh stated that she would like to have an evidentiary hearing, that it would take 6 hours, and that there have been many distributions made after the settlement agreement. Ms. Navia stated that they have addressed all the issues in the last accounting petition, that they provided same course of conduct from the approval of the Court.

The Court requested, Ms. Kavanagh to file a briefing on her request for an evidentiary hearing, to be filed by August 06, 2025. Opposing party to file a response by August 20, 2025.

Both matters are continued to September 3, 2025 at 9:00 a.m., in Dept. 204.

Judge: Stephen Murphy. Clerk: A. Datt. Deputy: Ng. Not reported.

ACCOUNTING PETITION RE: Accounting #2, Report, Fees
Off Calendar Jun-11-2025 Continued To Jul-23-25 At 09:00 A.M. In Dept 204
MINI MINUTES:

Appearances (via Zoom videoconference):
Ann Kavanagh, Esq., for Gene Yue, Trustee/Guardian of the Estate of minors.
Melanie Emmons, Esq., for Sook-Ling Leung, Petitioner/Trustee/Guardian of the Person of Minors.

The following related matters are called concurrently: PTR-23-306264 and PES-24-307218.

At the outset, counsel presented oral argument to support their positions regarding the subject matters. The court and counsel discuss the status of the subject matters including, but not limited to the delay in filing Mr. Yue's objection. Ms. Kavanagh reports of recently filing an objection. Ms. Emmons offers her position regarding the objection stating that she has not had time to review it, and requests a continuance to allow her, and the court, to review the objection.

After additional discussion, the subject matters are continued to Jul-23-2025 at 9:00 am in Dept. 204. The court instructs Ms. Emmons to file her reply to Mr. Yue's objection by Jul-09-2025.

Judge: Hon. Stephen M. Murphy. Clerk: Robert Woods. Deputy: Singh. Not Reported

ACCOUNTING PETITION RE: Accounting #2, Report, Fees
Off Calendar Mar-05-2025 Continued To Jun-11-25 At 09:00 A.M. In Dept 204

ACCOUNTING PETITION RE: Accounting #2, Report, Fees
Off Calendar Jan-08-2025 Continued To Mar-05-25 At 09:00 A.M. In Dept 204

PETITION First Account And Report Of Agent; Petition For Its Settlement; For Allowance Of Attorneys And Professional Fees For Agent
Off Calendar Aug-23-2024 Granted Per Written Order
MINI MINUTES:

The following matters were heard: PTR-23-306264 The Wyn Wang Leung Irrevocable Trust and
PES-24-307218 In Re: Power of Attorney for Wyn Wang Leung.

Appearances: Azita Rahim appeared by zoom for Gene Yue (guardian of the estate and trustee of the children's trust).
Melanie Emmons appeared by zoom for and with Sook-Ling Leung (trustee and agent) by zoom.

Mrs. Rahim stated that Mr. Yue represents both minors as the guardian of the estate and as the trustee of the children's trust, and that going forward she will be make sure that the signature page and the caption page correspond. The parties presented oral argument to support their positions regarding the issue of whether the settlement agreement releases all claims including the objections to the accountings. The issue of where Mr. Yue's fees are being paid from was also raised. The Amended First Account and Report, etc., and the First Account and Report of Agent, etc. are under submission.

Judge: Stephen M. Murphy. Clerk: Rosie Noguera. Deputy: K. Magdaleno. Not reported.
